docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL-CIVIL (TRANSACTION ID # 100040584) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, MALVIN
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-18-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, LAW OFFICE OF RICHARD C.J. WAHNNG AND RICHARDD CHAO JEN WAHNN'S MOTION TP BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTT MALVIN MA IS GRANTED. ORDER IS SIGNED.(SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/HK)
PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL, (TRANSACTION ID # 100047713): PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR WAHNG, RICHARD C.J. AS ATTORNEY FOR MA, MALVIN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-26-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
[PROPOSED] ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL-CIVIL; AND ****COURT REPORTER FEE ASSESSED**** (TRANSACTION ID # 100040584) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, MALVIN
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST MALVIN MA FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-18-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-07-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-30-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO WITHDRAW. THE SEP-26-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-18-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, MALVIN AS TO DEFENDANT WEHRER, JOSEPH SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-15-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-15-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-23-2018
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD (TRANSACTION ID # 100040584) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, MALVIN HEARING SET FOR JUL-18-2018 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-15-2018 CONTINUED TO SEP-26-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO WITHDRAW. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-30-2018 CONTINUED TO DEC-18-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-18-2018 CONTINUED TO FEB-26-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2018 Continued To Feb-26-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to FEB-26-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: CHARLES HAINES; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-11-2018 Continued To Dec-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-30-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2018 Continued To Sep-26-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Heather Norton, Esq. 415-728-3527 Specially appearing for Moving party.
No other apearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

LAW OFFICE OF RICHARD C.J. WAHNNG AND RICHARDD CHAO JEN WAHNN'S MOTION TP BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTT MALVIN MA.

Granted.

Order is signed.(see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
